instrument: BBDC position in Coherus 2029 Term Loan
value: Single-product dependence + revenue leakage to RPR atop ongoing losses
calculation_method: Orion analyst judgment based on extracted primary-source terms
holder_or_lender: Barings BDC, Inc. (BBDC)
notes: Coherus depends on one commercial product (LOQTORZI, $40.8M FY2025 net revenue) and carries a $1.4B accumulated deficit with continuing operating losses. The RPR skims product revenue ahead of the lenders, and the current comfort rests on a divestiture-funded cash pile (UDENYCA/CIMERLI sales) that is finite - if burn outpaces LOQTORZI growth, the liquidity-based coverage that protects BBDC today would compress
